$comment: Common context fields required in all team stdin files. The Go binary (goyoke-team-run) injects these when constructing agent prompts.

project_root.description: Absolute path to project root. Agents spawn with cmd.Dir set to this path. Must start with /.

team_dir.description: Absolute path to team working directory. Contains config.json, stdin/stdout files.

capabilities.$comment: Injected by buildPromptEnvelope() to inform agents of their Task() access level. See TASK-ACCESS-POLICY.md for rationale.

nesting_level.description: GOYOKE_NESTING_LEVEL set for this agent. Determines Task() access. Level 2 = team-spawned.

task_access.description: Which Task() model tiers are allowed at this nesting level.

mcp_tools.description: MCP tool availability for team-spawned agents.

spawn_agent.description: spawn_agent is MCP-only, not available in CLI sessions

policy_reference.description: Full policy documentation for Task() access at different nesting levels
